{{Expand}}

{{Infobox group
| name = Heaven’s Glory disciple
| introduced = cradle-09-bloodline
}}

== Bloodline ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|A [[Heaven’s Glory disciple]] wears a white and gold outer robe with a red sash.<ref name="cradle-09-bloodline-c6">''Bloodline'', chapter 6</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Cradle nav}}

[[Category:Groups]]
[[Category:Bloodline]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
[[Category:Cradle groups]]
